description: The act of creating novel solutions that enhance life and sustainability. It is the fusion of traditional wisdom with new methods and breakthrough thinking that serves collective flourishing.
rationale: The sharp 'ke' strikes like flint on steel, that precise moment when new possibility ignites. This spark immediately breathes into life through 'pha', the generative exhalation that gives form to flash of insight. The pairing creates dynamic tension - the crisp inception followed by organic unfolding, mirroring how innovation happens: sudden clarity expanding into sustainable creation. The word sounds like the very act it names: strike and breathe.
